ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stockid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "stock_name" TEXT /* Name of the stock */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the stock */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector in which the stock operates */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number for the stock */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the stock was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the stock was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stockid")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial data entry */,
  "stockid" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the data was recorded */,
  "loan" REAL /* Loan amount */,
  "provision_coverage" REAL /* Provision coverage */,
  "loanlossreserve_loan" REAL /* Loan loss reserve as a percentage of loan */,
  "netcapital" REAL /* Net capital */,
  "car" REAL /* Capital adequacy ratio (CAR) */,
  "total_assets" REAL /* Total assets of the stock */,
  "total_liabilities" REAL /* Total liabilities of the stock */,
  "equity" REAL /* Shareholder equity */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue of the stock */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income of the stock */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the financial data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the financial data entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the financial data entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_data_stockid FOREIGN KEY ("stockid") REFERENCES stocks ("stockid")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_weighted_assets" (
  "rwa_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk-weighted asset entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial data entry the RWA belongs to */,
  "rwa" REAL /* Risk-weighted asset value */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of asset */,
  "risk_weight" REAL /* Risk weight assigned to the asset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the RWA entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the RWA entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rwa_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_risk_weighted_assets_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES financial_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., financial analyst, auditor, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* User's position within the department */,
  "phone" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access event was logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES financial_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "core_capital" (
  "core_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each core capital entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial data entry the core capital belongs to */,
  "core_netcapital" REAL /* Core net capital value */,
  "core_car" REAL /* Core capital adequacy ratio (CAR) */,
  "tier1_capital" REAL /* Tier 1 capital value */,
  "tier2_capital" REAL /* Tier 2 capital value */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the core capital entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the core capital entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("core_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_core_capital_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES financial_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "merges" (
  "merge_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each merge entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial data entry the merge belongs to */,
  "merge_type" TEXT /* Type of merge (e.g., master only, matched) */,
  "merge_date" TEXT /* Date the merge occurred */,
  "merge_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the merge */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the merge entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the merge entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("merge_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_merges_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES financial_data ("data_id")
)
